bird.name: 棕頸鴨
bird.summary: 棕颈鸭（台湾作菲律賓鴨）（学名：Anas luzonica），又名吕宋鸭，是雁形目鸭科的一种鸟类。 其本地名稱為 papan。它是菲律賓的特有種。

relations.subject: 棕頸鴨
relations.evidence: Its habitat in a wide variety of wetlands from mountain lakes, marshes, small pools, streams, rivers, salt pans and even coastal waters where it feeds on shrimp, fish, insects and plant matter
relations.object_summary: 浅水、沼泽与植被斑块组成的高生产力生态系统。

relations.subject: 棕頸鴨
relations.evidence: Its habitat in a wide variety of wetlands from mountain lakes, marshes, small pools, streams, rivers, salt pans and even coastal waters where it feeds on shrimp, fish, insects and plant matter
relations.object_summary: 具有较高含水量和密生植被的浅水环境。

relations.subject: 棕頸鴨
relations.evidence: It is found in all types of wetlands within its range, but its preferred habitat is shallow freshwater marshland
relations.object_summary: 浅水、沼泽与植被斑块组成的高生产力生态系统。

relations.subject: 棕頸鴨
relations.evidence: This species has declined considerably since the 1960s because of hunting and habitat loss and is now listed as a Vulnerable species
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

relations.subject: 棕頸鴨
relations.evidence: This species has declined considerably since the 1960s because of hunting and habitat loss and is now listed as a Vulnerable species
relations.object_summary: 直接猎捕或误捕造成额外死亡。

relations.subject: 棕頸鴨
relations.evidence: The species has experienced steep population decreases since the 1970s mainly due to hunting and habitat loss
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

relations.subject: 棕頸鴨
relations.evidence: The species has experienced steep population decreases since the 1970s mainly due to hunting and habitat loss
relations.object_summary: 直接猎捕或误捕造成额外死亡。

relations.subject: 棕頸鴨
relations.evidence: The ducks have been heavily hunted since the 1960s with thousands being hunted a year through the late 1980s. Habitat loss is mainly due to wetland drainage, aquaculture, mangrove destruction and fishpond creation
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

relations.subject: 棕頸鴨
relations.evidence: The ducks have been heavily hunted since the 1960s with thousands being hunted a year through the late 1980s. Habitat loss is mainly due to wetland drainage, aquaculture, mangrove destruction and fishpond creation
relations.object_summary: 湿地被排干转为农业或建设用地。
